title: dangerouslySetInnerHTML without sanitization
description: Raw HTML injected into DOM — XSS if content is user-controlled
remediation: Wrap value with DOMPurify.sanitize() or use a safe renderer

title: innerHTML assignment
description: Direct innerHTML assignment enables XSS if value includes user input
remediation: Use textContent for text; DOMPurify.sanitize() for HTML

title: eval() usage
description: eval() executes arbitrary code — critical XSS and RCE vector
remediation: Replace with JSON.parse() for data; Function() for dynamic code

title: new Function() with user input
description: Dynamic function construction from user input — RCE vector
remediation: Never pass user input to new Function()

title: document.write() usage
description: document.write blocks parsing and enables XSS
remediation: Replace with safe DOM manipulation methods

title: outerHTML assignment
remediation: Use safe DOM methods or DOMPurify.sanitize()

title: Sensitive data in console log
description: Credentials or session data logged — leaks in log aggregators
remediation: Remove log or redact sensitive fields
